## Testing

- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check --fix`
- [ ] `uv run ty check --exclude tests/`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] Added / updated tests for this change

## Review Response

- [ ] All inline review comments addressed (not just top-level)
- [ ] Output format matches project conventions (e.g. PDF for LaTeX docs)
- [ ] Search/grid boundaries justified — if best result is at boundary, explain why before widening
- [ ] New content proportional to existing (check line count / page count before adding)
- [ ] Proposed granularity changes confirmed before implementing
